race.comment: WOODROW (9) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-four in all four career outings to date and strikes a very winnable contest here. Will be ready to peak now third run back from a spell and maps ideally for this from gate two. Hails from an astute barn and rates the testing material against this lot. Former Victorian CHANTILLY (12) is having her first run for the new stable but showed some ability on debut down south and gets the reliable Gollan/Lang combination. Keep very safe. SPOILT ROTTEN (7) has gotten better with each run this time in work and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. In the mix. LOFTY MACSPORRAN (4) just ran into one better when facing the starter for the first time and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. One for the multiples. THE AVIATOR (8) best of the rest.
